_comment: Interaction spot actions. action_id range: 1200–1299. Rope spots, shovel dig holes, and town spawn tiles.
_rope_spots: Use rope on these tiles to pull entities from the floor below
_shovel_dig: Use shovel on these tiles to reveal a hole underneath

1221._comment: Open hole state — step-on teleport down. This is the target of 1220.

1223._comment: Open passage state — step-on teleport down. Target of 1222.

_town_spawns: Step on these tiles to set your respawn point
